meaning: adj.粗暴的,乖戾的,阴沉的,无礼的,板面孔的
examples: He became surly and rude toward me.
During the flush times, salespeople were surly, waiters snobby.
He took a wrong exit on a recent night and turned surly and anxious.
My surly driver did not help, screaming down narrow streets that were relentless tunnels of gray.
